diagram_title: Stabilize 提示 快取 與 Harden 壓縮

activities.title: 組裝 提示
activities.description: 提示assembler 回合-level orchestration; produces static system 訊息, 上下文 preface 訊息, 與 triggers plugin hooks (C1, DD-12).

activities.title: Place 快取 Breakpoints
activities.description: Map BP1..BP4 onto outbound messages 依 DD-3 allocation (C4).

activities.title: Protect 壓縮 Anchor
activities.description: Apply sanitizer, 閒置 gate, 技能 binding, 快取-miss diagnosis around anchor write (C5, C6, C8, C9).

activities.title: Guard Capability Rebind
activities.description: Distinguish cross-帳號 vs same-帳號 fallback 在 CapabilityLayer.get (C7, DD-8).

activities.title: 發出 Telemetry
activities.description: 發布 提示.快取.* 與 壓縮.* 事件 依 DD-13 (C11).

arrows.label: 使用者 回合 submission
AGENTS.md / SYSTEM.md / 模型+agent+帳號 tuple
PreloadProvider, SkillLayerRegistry, system提示 builders
outbound messages[] (static system + preface + 使用者)
Anthropic 4-breakpoint budget; 依-Provider 快取 控制 variant
請求 到 LLM Provider 使用 快取控制 marks
壓縮 trigger (overflow / 閒置 / 快取-aware / etc.)
請求 供 current capability layer (依 回合)
RebindEpoch + 帳號id 的 已釘選 身分
已解析 CapabilityLayerCacheEntry OR thrown cross帳號rebind錯誤
sanitized anchor 訊息 appended 到 訊息-串流
BP placement 記錄 + Provider 回應 快取 headers
壓縮.快取missdiagnosis + 壓縮.閒置.deferred 事件
Bus-published telemetry 事件

activities.title: 建置 Static System 區塊
activities.description: Concatenate L1 Driver + L2 Agent + L3c AGENTS + L5 使用者-system + L6 BOUNDARY + L7 SYSTEM.md + L8 身分 在 DD-12 fixed order; 發出 byte-deterministic 文字 + sha256 hash (C2).

activities.title: 建置 上下文 Preface
activities.description: Pull T1 (README, cwd, 已釘選 技能, today's date) 與 T2 (active 技能, summary 技能) ranked slow-first; 發出 使用者-role 訊息 使用 kind=上下文-preface 與 tier-marked content 區塊 (C3, DD-1/2/4/5).

activities.title: Fan Out Plugin Hooks
activities.description: Fire experimental.chat.system.transform 使用 static 區塊; fire experimental.chat.上下文.transform 使用 上下文prefaceparts (C10, DD-11).

arrows.label: static tuple (模型, agent, 帳號, AGENTS.md, SYSTEM.md, 使用者-system, role)
預載 parts + 技能 註冊表 snapshot + date
static system 訊息
上下文 preface 上下文prefaceparts
static system 區塊 (文字 + hash)
上下文 preface 訊息
post-hook system + preface (mutated 由 plugins)
DD-12 fixed layer order
DD-1 envelope rule, DD-2 date-last rule, DD-4 single-訊息-multi-區塊 rule

activities.title: Sanitize Anchor Body
activities.description: Wrap body 在 <prior上下文 來源="{kind}">; rewrite imperative-leading lines 使用 'Note 來自 prior 上下文: ' 前綴 (C5, DD-6).

activities.title: Gate 閒置 壓縮
activities.description: 掃描 last 2 messages 供 unmatched 工具use; defer 使用 telemetry when unclean; pass through when clean (C6, DD-7).

activities.title: Bind 技能 到 Anchor
activities.description: 掃描 compacted span 供 技能 name references; 釘選 matched active/summary 技能; embed 技能snapshot 進入 anchor metadata (C8, DD-9).

activities.title: Diagnose 快取 Miss
activities.description: Compare last 3 staticsystem區塊 hashes; classify churn vs conversation-growth; gate 快取-aware 壓縮 (C9, DD-10).

arrows.label: 閒置壓縮 trigger (utilization > threshold)
should快取awarecompact trigger (快取 hit drop)
clean-tail OK; allow anchor pipeline
anchor body + metadata (技能snapshot attached)
sanitized anchor body 供 訊息-串流 追加
壓縮.快取missdiagnosis decision (compact yes/無)
壓縮.閒置.deferred telemetry (when unclean)
DD-6 wrapper + softening rules
DD-7 N=2 掃描 window
DD-9 auto-釘選 + snapshot rules
DD-10 churn-classification rules

validation_notes: plan-builder convention requires singular idef0.json; this file embeds A0 root + A1/A3 decompositions inline via the 'decompositions' map (per-level file split per miatdiagram §8.1 not adopted to match plan-validate.ts expectations).
Every activity has at least one input and one output arrow per IDEF0 §5 ICOM rules.
ModuleRefs in grafcet.json reference these activity IDs (A1, A11, A12, A13, A2, A3, A31, A32, A33, A34, A4, A5).
